subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of God! The gates of divine mercy are opened before thee and thy revered mother, and the proof of this is that your hours are spent in prayer [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای کنیز الهی ابواب رحمانی بجهت تو و ام محترمه باز است و دلیل آن که اوقاترا بمناجات
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @power of prayer
